mapper.select: SELECT * FROM form_item WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM form_item WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort, item_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_item (form_id, item_name, item_type, default_value, item_tip, placeholder, required, sort) VALUES (#{formId}, #{itemName}, #{itemType}, #{defaultValue}, #{itemTip}, #{placeholder}, #{required}, #{sort})
mapper.update:
UPDATE form_item
item_name = #{itemName}, item_type = #{itemType}, default_value = #{defaultValue}, item_tip = #{itemTip}, placeholder = #{placeholder}, required = #{required}, sort = #{sort},
WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE form_item SET deleted = 1 WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
UPDATE form_item SET deleted = 1 WHERE form_id = #{formId}
